items.title: [TEST] Remote content sync is active
items.markdownBody:
# [TEST] Remote content sync

![[TEST] Remote content sync is active](images/conference_2026.png)

> **Development/testing item.** This entry lives in `medbiophys-content/testing/` and is **not** part of the production manifest.

This news item is delivered from the **medbiophys-content** GitHub repository after manifest sync.

It does not ship inside the app bundle, which confirms that the remote cache layer is working.
